gjcObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .gjc/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .gjc/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

goals.title: 코어 스캐폴드와 결정론적 파이프라인 모듈
goals.objective: P1~P6 구현. pyproject.toml(deps, lazy-import 전제) + lectural/ 패키지 골격 + deps.py(ffmpeg/yt-dlp/paddleocr preflight, 없으면 명확 에러) + config.py(DEDUP_HIST_THRESHOLD, DEDUP_SSIM_THRESHOLD, MAX_GAP_SEC=60, SCENE_BINS_N, SCHEMA_VERSION=1) + acquisition.py(yt-dlp 자막 우선 + youtube-transcript-api 폴백 + --force-stt 시 audio 추출) + speech.py(faster-whisper medium int8 CPU, ko/en auto, 과길이 경고, 모델 오버라이드) + vad.py(silence mask → max_non_silence_untranscribed_gap_sec, wall-clock 비율 아님) + visual.py(ffmpeg I-frame+scene 2fps, 히스토그램/SSIM dedup) + ocr.py(PaddleOCR ko/en 주 + Tesseract degraded 폴백, ocr_engine 기록, 점증 슬라이드 re-split). 무거운 외부 호출은 함수 내부 lazy import로 격리. 단위테스트: test_dedup, test_vad(long_silence PASS / real_gap FAIL), test_ocr(re-split, ko/en fixture). AC-1~6, AC-9.
goals.evidence: G001 P1-P6 deterministic core complete; 49 offline tests pass (artifacts/g001-pytest.txt), 23 adversarial (artifacts/g001-redteam.txt); architect CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR+APPROVE (.gjc/plans/ralplan/2026-06-13-0738-79e5/stage-09-architect.md).

goals.title: 합성·커버리지 산출물과 계약
goals.objective: P7~P8 구현. synthesis.py(synthesis_input.json with SCHEMA_VERSION=1 + 결정론적 baseline summary.md[TOC+coverage 헤더+섹션별 timestamp/slide 링크] + transcript.md) + coverage.py(coverage.json {gapCheck, sceneCoverage, artifactExists, ocr_engine}) + synthesis_contract.md(schema_version 문서화). 단위테스트: test_summary_anchors(앵커 존재), test_coverage(3검사 정확). 출력 레이아웃 ./output/<video-title>/. AC-7, AC-8, AC-12, AC-13(부분).
goals.evidence: G002 synthesis+coverage complete; 78 offline tests pass (artifacts/g002-pytest.txt); deterministic raw transcript.md + baseline summary.md (anchors, no segment drops) + synthesis_input.json + coverage.json; architect CLEAR/CLEAR/CLEAR+APPROVE (.gjc/plans/ralplan/2026-06-13-0738-79e5/stage-13-architect.md).

goals.title: 스킬 패키징·완료 훅·검증 매트릭스
goals.objective: P9~P11 구현. cli.py(lectural <url...> [--force-stt] [--model] [--out], 단일+순차 배치) + runstate.py(active-run 포인터: env + state 파일, 세션 내 전 run 추적) + .claude/skills/lectural/SKILL.md(frontmatter+body) + references/ + .claude/settings.json(Stop 훅 wiring) + scripts/completeness_hook.py(runstate로 대상 run 식별, 비-LecturAL run no-op exit0, 3검사+summary 앵커 검증, 실패 exit2, 인터프리터 sys.executable/py-3 해석). AC-1..AC-13 검증 매트릭스 전수 실행(오프라인 단위테스트 기준, 실영상 스모크는 별도 표시). AC-2, AC-10, AC-11, AC-13.
